lyrics.text: Time's running up, tick tock
And I'm set on minely a thread of life
lyrics.translation: 我细细规划了自己的人生

lyrics.text: Do you believe in karma?
Let's live it up like Samsara
lyrics.translation: 让我们狂欢一场，就像轮回

lyrics.text: Someone might tell you life is deadly
lyrics.translation: 也许有人告诉你，生命如同死水

lyrics.text: But with us it's just one of many
lyrics.translation: 但与我们相伴，消沉不是唯一

lyrics.text: Come on, let us set the tone
Follow the rave, let's get it on
Take me home to Samsara, Samsara
Lose control like Samsara, Samsara
Come join us, we'll make it
lyrics.translation: 来加入我们吧，我们能成功

lyrics.text: Come join us, we'll take it
lyrics.translation: 来加入我们吧，我们会接受

lyrics.text: Take me home to Samsara, Samsara
Oooh...
Home to Samsara, Samsara
Oooh...
Home to Samsara, Samsara
(Samsara)
Don't waste your time, tick tock
lyrics.translation: 别浪费你的时间，时钟正滴答滴答

lyrics.text: Spend eternity on these wheels of life
Take a trip to Nirvana
Let's live it up like Samsara
lyrics.translation: 让我们狂欢一场，就像轮回

lyrics.text: Someone might tell you life is deadly
lyrics.translation: 也许有人告诉你，生命如同死水

lyrics.text: But with us it's just one of many
lyrics.translation: 但与我们相伴，消沉不是唯一

lyrics.text: Come on, let us set the tone
Follow the rave, let's get it on
Take me home to Samsara, Samsara
Lose control like Samsara, Samsara
Come join us, we'll make it
lyrics.translation: 来加入我们吧，我们能成功

lyrics.text: Come join us, we'll take it
lyrics.translation: 来加入我们吧，我们会接受

lyrics.text: Take me home to Samsara, Samsara
(Samsara)
